name: paymentcard
title: PaymentCard
description: Payment card visual for trading / finance surfaces — espresso, caramel, or paper; `frozen` grays it out.

files.content:
Payment card visual for trading / finance surfaces — espresso, caramel, or paper; `frozen` grays it out.

```jsx
<PaymentCard name="ADA OBI" number="•••• •••• •••• 4242" expiry="09/29" />
<PaymentCard variant="paper" frozen />
```
